title: bigelowia ramulosa
intro: Bigelowia ramulosa, also known as Bigelow's broom plant, is a perennial herb in the daisy family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves and roots, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bigelowia ramulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and support the immune system. Bigelowia ramulosa is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
